answers: Resume tips: quantify achievements (increased sales 30%), use action verbs, tailor for each job, and keep to 1-2 pages.
Format: clean design, clear headings, reverse chronological order, and ATS-friendly (simple formatting, keywords).
Mistakes: typos, generic objective, irrelevant info, long paragraphs, and not customizing for the position.
Resume lekha: achievements likho (numbers dao), action verb use koro, tailor koro each job er jonno.
